prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-GLASSMIXBOWL-33OZ-AQUA-STD Product Type: FOOD_STORAGE_CONTAINER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 33oz Ribbed Glass Food Storage Containers with Airtight Lids - Microwave Freezer Fridge Dishwasher Safe Bowls for Kitchen (Aqua Blue) Description: Bring style, organization and everyday ease into the kitchen with Beille's Glass Mixing Bowls with Lid, available in 67oz or 33oz capacities. Designed for the modern home cook, these glass mixing bowls transition effortlessly from prep to serve to store, eliminating clutter and enhancing the way you move through daily baking, cooking and food or meal prep rituals.

Made from high quality, these serving and storage bowls offer a clean, non toxic alternative to plastic food storage. The clear ribbed design adds a subtle touch of elegance while allowing you to easily see contents at a glance, perfect for both everyday use or serving. Whether you're mixing ingredients, storing leftovers or serving dishes straight to the table, these bowls bring both function and style to any kitchen.

Each bowl is paired with a secure, airtight lid designed to lock in freshness and prevent leaks. Ideal for storing food in the refrigerator, freezer, or on the go, the tight seal helps preserve flavor and extend shelf life. Built for real life convenience, these glass bowls are microwave safe for easy reheating (do not microwave the lid), freezer safe for long term storage, and dishwasher safe for effortless cleanup. From meal prep to serving to storage, they seamlessly adapt to your daily routine.

Upgrade your everyday kitchen essentials with these beautifully designed glass mixing bowls from Beille, where modern simplicity meets practical performance. Search Terms: Meal prep containers; food storage; glass mixing bowls; food prep; kitchen essentials; baking supplies; home and kitchen; housewarming gifts new home; nesting bowls; salad bowl; wedding gifts; glass storage container Features: - MULTIPURPOSE GLASS STORAGE BOWLS: Perfect for meal prep, food storage and serving, Beille’s versatile glass bowls are designed for everyday kitchen use; use for salads, leftovers, snacks, fruit and more - MICROWAVE, FREEZER, FRIDGE & DISHWASHER SAFE: Built for everyday convenience, these durable glass bowls safely transition from fridge or freezer to microwave and dishwasher; Reheat, store and clean with ease, with no need to transfer between containers (do not put lid in microwave) - AIRTIGHT LIDS KEEP FOOD FRESH LONGER: Each bowl includes a secure, tight-fitting lid that locks in freshness and helps prevent spills; Great for storing leftovers, meal prep, or transporting food without leaks - PREMIUM GLASS FOR SAFE FOOD STORAGE: Made from high quality, non toxic glass, these bowls won’t absorb odors, stains or flavors over time; A clean, reliable alternative to traditional plastic containers for everyday use, storage and meal prep - STYLISH RIBBED DESIGN WITH TWO CONVENIENT SIZES: Includes 33oz and 67oz bowls with contemporary ribbed texture that adds visual appeal to any kitchen; nesting design and dishwasher safe materials offers quick cleanup and efficient storage in any kitchen === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 33oz Aqua Glass Food Storage Bowls with Lids

tokens.name: Glass Food Storage Bowls with Lids

anthropic.title_differentiation: Airtight Lids, Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Safe, Ribbed Glass Design, Meal Prep And Storage
